_comment: Per-build hook-point map (design doc §5.3), here for the minimm prototype build. In production TMOS this is emitted by the build pipeline, signed, and shipped alongside the image; a shield resolves its target hook by NAME against this map, and arg_btf carries the CO-RE relocation info for the argument struct.

hook_points.name: ls_request_eval_decision
hook_points.abort_branch: host returns LS_DROP/LS_RESET before process_frame() dispatch; no state to unwind (design §6.1)
